nodes.name: bug_report.md
nodes.summary: Bug report issue template for Mnemosyne. Collects environment details (OS, Python version, Mnemosyne version/commit, installation method, Hermes version), reproduction steps with minimal code snippets, expected vs actual behavior, Mnemosyne status output (stats), optional database diagnostics, and a pre-submission checklist. Configured with label 'bug' and title prefix '[BUG]'.
nodes.languageNotes: GitHub issue template in Markdown with YAML frontmatter. Contains 8 H2 sections covering environment, reproduction, expected/actual behavior, diagnostics, and a checklist. Includes embedded code blocks for Python and shell commands.

nodes.name: config.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub issue template chooser configuration for Mnemosyne. Disables blank issue submissions and redirects general questions/discussions to the GitHub Discussions forum and security vulnerabilities to the private advisory form.
nodes.languageNotes: YAML config file with two entries: blank_issues_enabled flag (set to false) and two contact_links items directing users to Discussions and Security Advisories.

nodes.name: docs_improvement.md
nodes.summary: Documentation improvement request template for Mnemosyne. Guides contributors to specify the file/section needing improvement, current state (what it says now), suggested change with rationale, and any additional context. Configured with label 'documentation' and title prefix '[DOCS]'.
nodes.languageNotes: GitHub issue template in Markdown with YAML frontmatter. Contains 4 H2 sections: Location, Current State, Suggested Change, and Additional Context. Designed for lightweight doc fix submissions.

nodes.name: feature_request.md
nodes.summary: Feature request template for Mnemosyne. Prompts submitters to describe the problem/motivation, proposed solution with specifics, alternatives considered, impact assessment (breaking changes, beneficiaries), and willingness to contribute via PR. Configured with label 'enhancement' and title prefix '[FEATURE]'.
nodes.languageNotes: GitHub issue template in Markdown with YAML frontmatter. Contains 5 H2 sections: Problem/Motivation, Proposed Solution, Alternatives Considered, Impact, and Willing to Contribute (with checkbox options for PR readiness).

nodes.name: Questions & Discussions
nodes.summary: Contact link directing users to GitHub Discussions at https://github.com/AxDSan/mnemosyne/discussions for questions, use cases, and idea discussions before opening an issue.

nodes.name: Security Vulnerability
nodes.summary: Contact link directing users to the private security advisory form at https://github.com/AxDSan/mnemosyne/security/advisories/new for reporting security vulnerabilities confidentially.
